info.name: GABRIEL-RSP
info.description:
GABRIEL — Local Genius Claude for RSP / NOIZY.AI
Full 8-layer agentic control center.
Discord Voice In → GABRIEL Brain → Slack + Cloudflare → MC96ECO Universe

Environment: GABRIEL-ENV
Daily Spend Cap: $5.00 USD
Model Stack: claude-haiku-4-5 (API) + qwen3:14b (local)
Hardware: Apple M2 Ultra | Network: Rogers Fiber
